title: Add header Settings button with Privacy Policy link popup

requirements.summary: Add a Settings (gear) button to the header’s top-right button group alongside Theme and Language, matching existing button styling across breakpoints.
acceptanceCriteria: A Settings (gear) button is visible in the header’s right-side button group on both mobile and desktop breakpoints.
The Settings button styling is consistent with the existing header buttons (theme-aware colors, focus ring, min tap target).

file_operations.description: Add a new Settings (gear) header button in the existing right-side button group with consistent theme-aware styling, focus ring, and 44px min tap target; extend the popup toggle state to include 'settings' and ensure the button renders appropriately on mobile (icon-only) and desktop (icon + label).

requirements.summary: Implement a header-anchored Settings popup/panel that can be opened/dismissed and contains a clearly visible "Privacy Policy" link opening the required URL in a new tab safely.
acceptanceCriteria: Tapping the Settings button opens a popup/panel anchored to the header (similar interaction pattern to existing Theme/Language popups).
The popup/panel contains a "Privacy Policy" link labeled in English exactly as "Privacy Policy".
Clicking the "Privacy Policy" link opens https://sites.google.com/view/frequencyverseapp/privacy-policy with target=_blank and rel="noopener noreferrer".
The popup/panel can be dismissed (e.g., tapping outside or pressing a close action) without breaking existing Theme/Language popups.

file_operations.description: Create a new Settings popup component that follows the same interaction pattern as ThemeSelectorPopup/LanguageSelectorPopup: renders an overlay for outside-click dismissal, supports Escape-to-close, positions itself anchored under the Settings button in the header, uses theme-aware colors via useVisualTheme, and includes a clearly visible "Privacy Policy" anchor linking to https://sites.google.com/view/frequencyverseapp/privacy-policy with target="_blank" and rel="noopener noreferrer".

Wire the new SettingsPopup into the header: import and render it when openPopup === 'settings'; ensure toggling Settings does not break existing Theme/Language popup behavior and that only one popup is open at a time.

requirements.summary: Preserve the existing footer Privacy Policy link unchanged while adding the new Settings-based entry point to the same URL.
acceptanceCriteria: The footer still renders the existing "Privacy Policy" link and continues to work after the header Settings changes.
The Privacy Policy URL is identical in both places (https://sites.google.com/view/frequencyverseapp/privacy-policy).

file_operations.description: Verify the existing footer "Privacy Policy" link remains present and unchanged in behavior and URL after introducing the header Settings popup (no functional changes intended; ensure regressions are not introduced).
